storyHook: 看房问租金，谈条件，决定租下

narrative.when: 周六下午，下周要搬出宿舍
narrative.method: 看房间、问租金、谈条件、决定租期
narrative.event: 甲预算有限，要在今天定下住处

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good afternoon. I am here for the flat.
turns.zh: 下午好，我是来看房的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, come in. I am Brown.
turns.zh: 好的，请进。我是布朗。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The steps are a bit much. But the place looks good from here.
turns.zh: 台阶有点多，不过从这儿看房子还不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the view is better from the top. This way.
turns.zh: 是的，楼上的视野更好。这边走。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The living room gets much sun. That is a good thing.
turns.zh: 客厅采光很好，这是个加分项。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It does. South-facing, so warm all day.
turns.zh: 确实，朝南，整天都暖和。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How much for the house a month?
turns.zh: 房子每月多少钱？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Twelve hundred. Water and heating are in that.
turns.zh: 一千二，水费和暖气都算在里面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a bit high for me. I was hoping for nine hundred.
turns.zh: 这对我来说有点高，我本以为九百。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nine hundred is too low for this part. All the house things are new.
turns.zh: 在这个地段九百太低了，家具都是新的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see they are new. But my money is short.
turns.zh: 我看得出来是新的，但我手头紧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How much can you give then?
turns.zh: 那你最多能给多少？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would one thousand be possible?
turns.zh: 一千块行吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One thousand... I would have to say no to that.
turns.zh: 一千……那我只能说不。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if I give more for the first payment?
turns.zh: 如果我首付多交点呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What do you say?
turns.zh: 你这话什么意思？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put down two months now, but the price is one thousand a month.
turns.zh: 我现在付两个月，但每月价格是一千。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two months now? That is two thousand up front.
turns.zh: 先付两个月？那就是两千块现钱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. And the rest month by month. That is right, is it not?
turns.zh: 对，剩下的按月付。这样挺公平的，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. But I still need one year on the paper.
turns.zh: 行。但我还是要在纸上写一年。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A year is too long for me. I may move for work after six months.
turns.zh: 一年对我来说太长了，六个月后我可能因为工作要搬。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: If you go after six months, I have to get a new man. That is trouble.
turns.zh: 你六个月就走，我还得再找人，挺麻烦的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep the place clean and in good order. No damage.
turns.zh: 我会保持房子干净整洁，不会有损坏。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Six months then. But you give me all six months now.
turns.zh: 好吧，那就六个月。但你要一次性付清六个月房租。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Six thousand at one time? That is a great number for me.
turns.zh: 一次性六千？对我来说太多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see your point. But I have my rules.
turns.zh: 我明白你的意思，但我有我的规矩。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about three months now and three after?
turns.zh: 先付三个月，后面三个月再付怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three months now is still three thousand. That is less hard.
turns.zh: 先付三个月就是三千，压力小点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would be happy with that. And you get your money safe.
turns.zh: 这样我也乐意，你的钱也稳当。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. Three thousand now, three thousand in three months.
turns.zh: 行吧，先付三千，三个月后再付三千。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great! I will get the money tomorrow.
turns.zh: 太好了！我明天去取钱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. I take card or net payment.
turns.zh: 不用，我收刷卡或网络支付。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Even better. I will do the payment now then.
turns.zh: 那更好，我现在就付。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me get the payment box. One second.
turns.zh: 我去拿刷卡机，稍等。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. I will look at the room again.
turns.zh: 不着急，我再看看房间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is the box. You put your card in.
turns.zh: 刷卡机来了，您把卡插进去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let me do that now.
turns.zh: 好，我现在就刷。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The payment went through.
turns.zh: 好了，钱到账了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. So when may I come in?
turns.zh: 好的，那我什么时候能搬进来？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Seven days from now from ten in the morning. I will be here.
turns.zh: 下周六上午十点起就行，我在这儿等你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will come on day six morning.
turns.zh: 那好，我第六天早上过来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have a car for your things?
turns.zh: 你有车搬东西吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, just bags. I do not have much.
turns.zh: 没有，就几个包，东西不多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. The lift is working, so no trouble.
turns.zh: 那没问题，电梯能用，不费劲。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. One more thing: is the net connection ready?
turns.zh: 好的，还有件事：网线通了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is on. The name and key are on the box.
turns.zh: 通了，账号密码在盒子上写着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. I will need that for my work.
turns.zh: 太好了，我工作需要上网。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. Then you will be happy here.
turns.zh: 明白，那你在这儿会住得舒服。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would say so. The room gets good light.
turns.zh: 我也觉得，这房间采光好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. It is a good place. be safe of it.
turns.zh: 是啊，好地方，好好爱护。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: May we have another look at the cooking room?
turns.zh: 我们能再看一眼厨房吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. This way. The water is warm, and the fire is clean.
turns.zh: 好的，这边走。水是热的，火也干净。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The ice box is new. That is good.
turns.zh: 冰箱是新的，不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I put it in last month. It keeps things cold well.
turns.zh: 对，上个月装的，制冷很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the washing machine? Does it work?
turns.zh: 洗衣机呢，好用吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It does. I will let you see. You put the clothes in, put your finger on this, and it goes.
turns.zh: 好用，我演示给你看。衣服放进去，按这个键就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is simple. I like that.
turns.zh: 简单，我喜欢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The place is ready for you. No troubles so far.
turns.zh: 房子都准备好了，目前没啥问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy with it. But the price is still a bit high for me.
turns.zh: 我挺满意的，但价格对我来说还是有点高。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I gave you a good price. This part is in need.
turns.zh: 我已经给你好价了，这地段抢手。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. But I am learning, so my money is short.
turns.zh: 我懂，但我在学习，所以手头紧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is your top number?
turns.zh: 你最多能出多少？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was hoping for nine hundred a month.
turns.zh: 我本来希望九百一个月。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nine hundred is too low for this place.
turns.zh: 九百太低了，这房子不行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if I give you a thousand?
turns.zh: 那要是我出一千呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A thousand is still low, but I might say yes if you give the money for six months at one time.
turns.zh: 一千还是低，但如果你一次性给六个月的钱，我可能同意。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Six months all at one time? That is six thousand. Hard for me.
turns.zh: 一次性付半年？那就是六千，对我来说难。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the best I can do.
turns.zh: 这是我能给的最好条件了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see... I will take it. Six months, a thousand a month.
turns.zh: 让我想想……我租了。半年，每月一千。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then it is fixed.
turns.zh: 好，那我们说定了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see the rooms again.
turns.zh: 我们再看看房间吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Take your time.
turns.zh: 好的，慢慢看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The room window gets good light.
turns.zh: 房间窗户采光不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it faces south. Warm in winter.
turns.zh: 对，朝南，冬天暖和。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Does the payment for the room cover heating?
turns.zh: 房间的费用包含暖气吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, that is separate. About fifty a month.
turns.zh: 不，另外算，大概每月五十。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. And the water and electric?
turns.zh: 好的。水电呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Those are on you as well. Not much.
turns.zh: 也是你付，不多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quite right. The place is clean and quiet.
turns.zh: 没错。这地方干净又安静。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what I was going for. Happy you like it.
turns.zh: 我就是想这样。很高兴你喜欢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So the payment is twelve hundred a month?
turns.zh: 所以月付款是一千二？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is the price. Good value for this part.
turns.zh: 对，就是这个价。这地段很值了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have little money. Is nine hundred possible?
turns.zh: 我钱不多。九百可以吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nine hundred? That is too low. The house things are all new.
turns.zh: 九百？太低了。家里的东西都是新的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about one thousand? I give the first month and a safe money.
turns.zh: 一千怎么样？我付首月并给一笔押金。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One thousand is still low. But I might do one thousand fifty.
turns.zh: 一千还是低。但一千零五十可以考虑。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One thousand fifty... That is still a bit much. What about one thousand, and I give you six months all at one time?
turns.zh: 一千零五十……还是有点吃力。一千怎么样，我一次性付半年？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Six months all at one time? That is six thousand. That would help me.
turns.zh: 一次性付半年？那就是六千。这倒帮了我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I can get the money together. I would take good care of the place.
turns.zh: 对。我能凑到钱。我会好好爱护房子的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. One thousand a month, six months up front. It is a go.
turns.zh: 行。一千一个月，半年预付。成交。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: May we see the room again? I would like to be certain.
turns.zh: 我们再看一眼房间吧？我想确认一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. This way. Sun comes in all afternoon.
turns.zh: 好的。这边请。下午阳光一直照进来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The window is good. And the bed is new, yes?
turns.zh: 窗户不错。床是新的，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, new bed, new table. I put them in last month.
turns.zh: 对，新床新桌子。上个月刚换的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cooking room is clean. That is important for me.
turns.zh: 厨房很干净。这对我来说很重要。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I keep it clean. The last man was a cook. No trouble.
turns.zh: 我保持得很干净。上一个租户是厨师，没出过问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then I am happy. Let us make the paper work.
turns.zh: 好。那我满意了。我们来办手续吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me get the paper from the drawer.
turns.zh: 好的。我从抽屉里拿合同出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. I will have a last look at the room.
turns.zh: 不着急。我最后再看一眼房间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here it is. Two copies. Please go through it.
turns.zh: 给你。一式两份。请过目。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The price for the room is one thousand a month, six months up front. That is right.
turns.zh: 房间的价格每月一千，半年预付。没错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. The first payment is for one moon of the room. I have the money ready.
turns.zh: 是的。首付是一个月的房间使用费。钱我已经准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Put your name at the end of every page.
turns.zh: 好的。每页末尾签上你的名字。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. Here is the money. Six thousand for the house, one thousand as a safe note.
turns.zh: 签好了。这是钱。六千房费，一千押金。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will see. ... Seven thousand. That is right.
turns.zh: 我数一下……七千。数目对了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is your key. The one for the front door, the small one for your room.
turns.zh: 这是你的钥匙。大门那把，小的是你房间的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I will come on the day after the last day of the week with my things.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我会在一周最后一天之后的那天带我的东西过来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. The room will be ready for you.
turns.zh: 没问题。房间会给你准备好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will be here about ten in the morning.
turns.zh: 好的。我大概早上十点到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. See you then. Take care of the key.
turns.zh: 好。到时候见。保管好钥匙。

storyBlurb: 预算紧张的租客在周六下午看房，房东开出高价，但房间条件诱人。经过一番讨价还价，双方终于达成协议。
storyScript:
【开场·预约看房】周六下午三点，甲准时来到居民区那栋灰白色公寓楼下。他抬头望了望五楼窗户，深吸一口气，按响门铃。对讲机里传来乙的声音，确认身份后，铁门咔嗒一声开了。甲爬上楼梯，心里盘算着预算：这个月生活费只剩两千，房租不能超过八百。乙已在门口等候，是个四十来岁的中年男人，穿着格子衬衫，笑容客气。简单寒暄后，乙引他进屋。

【进行·参观议价】客厅不大，但采光很好，午后阳光斜照在木地板上。卧室朝南，窗外能看到小区花园。厨房和卫生间都干净整洁，热水器、冰箱、洗衣机一应俱全。甲心里满意，但脸上不露声色。他问月租多少，乙报出一千二。甲心里一沉，这远超预算。他试探性还价，说学生租房预算有限，能否降到九百。乙摇头，说这地段这个价已经很公道了，而且家具家电都是新的。甲沉默片刻，又看了看房间，确实不错。

【进行·谈条件】甲提出折中方案：一千，但押一付一。乙犹豫了一下，说押金可以少点，但租金不能再降。甲又说租期只签半年，因为下学期可能实习换地方。乙皱眉，说半年太短，至少一年。甲解释自己情况特殊，但保证会爱惜房子。乙考虑了一会儿，最终同意半年，但要求甲一次性付清半年租金。甲计算了一下，半年六千，虽然压力大，但可以找朋友借点。他咬咬牙，答应了。

【收束·决定签约】双方谈妥，乙从抽屉里拿出租房合同。甲仔细看了条款，确认无误后签了字。乙收了押金和半年租金，把钥匙交给甲，说下周六就可以搬进来。甲接过钥匙，心里一块石头落地。走出公寓时，夕阳西下，他掏出手机给室友发消息：房子搞定了，下周搬！
